_description: Workbook queue. Each entry is one real-world agent APPLICATION (a reusable target), not a framework tutorial. `harness_focus` names the harness attribute the example is built to demonstrate -- that lens, not the framework, is the lesson. Pick the next pending item by priority and scaffold it with the 4-phase commit protocol in AGENTS.md.

_field_notes.domain: the business area the use case lives in
_field_notes.harness_focus: the harness attribute this example isolates (action space, observation shaping, structured output + validation, routing, guardrails, grounding, delegation, ...)
_field_notes.framework: advisory default only -- keep examples provider/framework-agnostic (configurable model, no hardcoded vendor in code)

queue.harness_focus: action space -- reason -> call tool -> observe loop
queue.description: Hello world ReAct agent -- model loops through reason-act-observe with math tools

queue.harness_focus: schema-constrained output + validation -- urgency/category as a typed result, not free text
queue.description: Classify inbound emails by urgency and category -- first real-world structured extraction

queue.harness_focus: structured output + retry on invalid -- Pydantic schema is the contract, model retries until it validates
queue.description: Extract vendor, amount, date, and line items from invoice text using Pydantic schemas

queue.harness_focus: rubric in the prompt + grounded reasoning -- score must cite the ICP criteria it used
queue.description: Score inbound sales leads against ICP criteria and recommend next action

queue.harness_focus: classification -> conditional routing -> guarded draft reply (absorbs human-in-the-loop)
queue.description: Classify support tickets by type and urgency, route to the right team, draft first response

queue.harness_focus: scoring rubric + comparable structured output across many inputs
queue.description: Score resumes against a job spec and surface top candidates with reasoning

queue.harness_focus: long-context extraction -- pull a typed requirement list out of a large document
queue.description: Extract requirements, deadlines, and scoring criteria from procurement RFP text

queue.harness_focus: subagent delegation + handoff contracts (absorbs supervisor pattern)
queue.description: Supervisor agent coordinates a researcher sub-agent and a writer sub-agent to produce a research brief

queue.harness_focus: legal document critique + structured risk register -- every risk finding cites the clause it comes from, no ungrounded assertions
queue.description: Review a commercial contract and return a structured analysis: risk clauses by severity, missing protections, negotiation points ranked high-medium-low, and recommended redlines

queue.harness_focus: multi-document risk extraction + severity matrix -- N documents in, one unified risk register out with likelihood x impact scoring
queue.description: Read multiple company documents (financials, contracts, management bio) and produce a commercial due diligence risk register with severity, likelihood, and recommended mitigation per finding

queue.harness_focus: multi-agent document generation -- supervisor decomposes RFP, specialist agents draft each section, assembler produces a typed Proposal object
queue.description: Build a complete RFP response: supervisor parses requirements, specialist agents draft executive summary, approach, team, and commercials sections, assembler returns a structured Proposal object

queue.harness_focus: executive critique + structured risk prioritization -- long-context document, output is a director briefing not a raw summary
queue.description: Review a board pack and produce a structured director briefing: top risks, information gaps, key decisions required, and suggested questions for management -- framed for a non-executive director

queue.harness_focus: multi-criteria financial scoring rubric + grounded shortlist -- extends lead-qualifier pattern to M&A with strategic fit, financial, and operational criteria
queue.description: Score acquisition targets against a defined screening rubric (strategic fit, size, geography, sector) and produce a ranked shortlist with a structured target assessment card per candidate

queue.harness_focus: fan-out output -- one input produces multiple typed output schemas simultaneously (reply draft + action items + follow-up tracker)
queue.description: Turn a meeting transcript or email thread into a structured set of outputs: drafted reply, extracted action items with owners and deadlines, and a follow-up tracker entry

queue.harness_focus: citation-grounded extraction -- every obligation, deadline, and penalty finding must cite the source article or clause, refusal to assert without attribution
queue.description: Analyze a regulatory document (financial services, capital markets, or sector-specific) and return a structured compliance summary: obligations, deadlines, penalties, and the exact clause each finding comes from

queue.harness_focus: structured diagnosis + 2D effort-impact ranking -- model identifies root causes and must place each recommendation on an effort x impact matrix
queue.description: Analyze an operational profile and produce a cost optimization assessment: identified inefficiencies each scored on effort-to-fix vs savings-potential, sorted by quick wins first

queue.harness_focus: multi-dimension readiness scoring -- model evaluates a company across governance, financials, market, legal, and narrative dimensions with a go/no-go gate per dimension
queue.description: Produce a capital raising or IPO readiness assessment: score the company across five readiness dimensions, surface blockers per gate, and produce a prioritized remediation plan

queue.harness_focus: audience-targeted generation -- same company data produces different structured outputs shaped for different investor personas (VC vs PE vs family office)
queue.description: Generate fundraising materials from a company brief: investor thesis, target investor profile per round type, and a structured fundraising timeline -- output structure varies by investor persona

queue.harness_focus: code-tool use + numeric output -- agent writes and executes Python to build financial projections, result is a validated numeric model not a text description
queue.description: Build a 3-year P&L, balance sheet, and cash flow projection: agent extracts assumptions from a business brief, writes Python to compute the model, validates outputs (net income, FCF, DSCR), and interprets results

queue.harness_focus: tool-augmented research + structured synthesis -- web search tools feed a structured market analysis output, grounding replaces hallucination
queue.description: Conduct a market entry analysis: agent uses web search tools to gather market size, competitor landscape, and regulatory environment, then synthesizes a structured strategy brief with opportunity and risk scoring

queue.harness_focus: multi-source monitoring + structured intelligence brief -- tool-augmented agent consolidates signals from multiple sources into a single typed briefing object
queue.description: Monitor a client across news, regulatory filings, and market data using search tools, then produce a structured intelligence brief: funding events, leadership changes, regulatory exposure, and strategic signals

queue.harness_focus: stateful entity tracking -- agent maintains a typed project state object and applies incremental updates from unstructured inputs (emails, notes, status calls)
queue.description: Parse project update inputs and maintain a structured project state: milestones, risks, blockers, and deliverable owners -- agent applies each new update to the existing typed object and flags new risks

queue.harness_focus: retrieval-augmented generation -- agent retrieves relevant precedents before drafting, grounding new output in institutional knowledge rather than parametric memory
queue.description: Search a corpus of past proposals and engagement reports to surface relevant precedents, then synthesize a structured knowledge brief that grounds and cites prior work when drafting new proposals

queue.harness_focus: provider-agnostic structured output -- OpenRouter unified API with the openai SDK; swap model string to change provider, pattern stays identical, making the harness independent of any single LLM vendor
queue.description: Replicate the email triage pattern using OpenRouter (OPENROUTER_API_KEY) and the openai SDK pointed at openrouter.ai/api/v1: show how the structured output pattern is provider-agnostic -- same Pydantic schema, same parse logic, any model

queue.harness_focus: provider-agnostic ReAct from scratch -- manual message loop, tool dispatch dict, OpenRouter as the backend; shows what orchestrators abstract away and that the loop itself is framework-independent
queue.description: Implement a minimal ReAct loop from scratch using only the openai SDK + OpenRouter: message history list, tool dispatch dict, while loop, 80 lines total -- replicate example 1 without LangGraph to show what the framework buys you

queue.harness_focus: schema-first agent framework -- PydanticAI wraps the model call in a typed agent whose output and tool signatures are defined entirely in Pydantic; contrast with LangChain LCEL chain approach
queue.description: Build an invoice extractor using PydanticAI: define tools and output model as Pydantic types, let the framework handle retry and validation -- show how schema-first frameworks differ from chain-first frameworks

queue.harness_focus: multi-provider comparison via OpenRouter -- same prompt sent to multiple models in parallel, responses structured into a typed comparison object; shows provider-agnostic orchestration and output normalisation
queue.description: Send the same market brief to three different models via OpenRouter in parallel (e.g. llama-3, mistral, claude-haiku), collect structured StrategicOpinion objects from each, and synthesise into a ModelConsensus -- shows provider diversity without vendor lock-in

queue.harness_focus: real public API tool use + risk scoring -- agent calls OSV.dev (no key required) to fetch known CVEs for each dependency, ranks findings by severity, structured output
queue.description: Read a requirements.txt or package.json, call the OSV.dev open vulnerability database for each package, and return a structured risk report ranked by severity -- no API key needed, real data every run
queue.free_api: OSV.dev (Google Open Source Vulnerability DB -- no key required)

queue.harness_focus: real public API + document chunking + rubric-based evaluation -- fetches live 10-K filings from SEC EDGAR, extracts ESG disclosures, scores against CSRD categories with citation grounding
queue.description: Fetch a company's 10-K filing from SEC EDGAR (no key required), extract ESG-related disclosures, and score them against CSRD reporting categories -- every finding cites the source section
queue.free_api: SEC EDGAR full-text search API (no key required)

queue.harness_focus: multi-source data fusion + structured scoring -- agent calls World Bank Governance Indicators API (no key) for each supplier country, fuses results into a geopolitical risk scorecard
queue.description: Score a supplier list by geopolitical risk -- agent fetches World Bank governance indicators per country, weighs them against a risk rubric, and returns a ranked supplier risk register
queue.free_api: World Bank Open Data API (no key required)

queue.harness_focus: real API integration + sentiment classification + stateful delta tracking -- pulls live headlines via NewsAPI free tier, classifies sentiment per article, tracks week-over-week delta
queue.description: Pull recent headlines for a brand or competitor from NewsAPI, run per-article sentiment scoring, and produce a structured weekly digest with trend direction and notable shifts
queue.free_api: NewsAPI free tier (100 req/day, API key from newsapi.org)

queue.harness_focus: multi-agent fan-out + result aggregation -- supervisor splits a new-hire checklist across IT, HR, and Facilities sub-agents; each resolves their queue and reports back a typed completion status
queue.description: Turn a new-hire start date and role into a parallel onboarding plan -- supervisor delegates IT provisioning, HR paperwork, and Facilities setup to specialist sub-agents and aggregates their typed responses into a day-1 readiness report

queue.harness_focus: classifier router + conditional downstream logic -- NPS response classified into retain/neutral/escalate; each branch runs different follow-up logic and drafts a different typed reply
queue.description: Read a batch of NPS survey responses, classify each into a retention, neutral, or escalation queue, and draft a personalised follow-up response per segment -- same pattern as support ticket router but applied to customer success signals

queue.harness_focus: real public API + structured output + filtering logic -- queries Open FDA clinical trials endpoint with patient criteria, filters on eligibility, returns ranked matches with plain-language eligibility summary
queue.description: Take a patient condition and basic eligibility criteria, query the Open FDA clinical trials API (no key), filter and rank matching trials, and return a structured brief with eligibility summary per match

queue.harness_focus: multi-perspective fan-out + synthesis -- three specialist sub-agents each read the same analyst reports from a bull, bear, and risk lens; synthesis agent produces a concise one-page board memo citing all three
queue.description: Fan out three analyst reports to bull, bear, and risk sub-agents in parallel; each produces a typed opinion; synthesis agent combines them into a structured one-page board memo with a recommended position

queue.harness_focus: tool use (log parser) + structured document generation -- agent calls a log-parsing tool to extract timeline and affected services, then generates a complete postmortem doc with root cause, timeline, and action items
queue.description: Feed a raw incident timeline log to a tool-calling agent; it parses the log, extracts root cause and affected services, and drafts a complete postmortem document with timeline and prevention actions

queue.harness_focus: parallel specialist fan-out -- one campaign brief fans out simultaneously to email copy, social captions, and blog outline sub-agents; results assembled into a typed multi-channel content pack
queue.description: Turn one campaign brief into a full content pack -- fan out in parallel to specialist agents for email copy, social captions, and a blog post outline; assemble all three into a single typed ContentPack object
